title: Chapter 100
content:
Chapter 100: Tara

The door swung open, and as Antonia and Denzel stepped inside, he was greeted by a mixture of familiar and unfamiliar faces.

The house itself was neatly arranged, warm and inviting. Soft orange light filled the interior, giving the place a cozy atmosphere despite the number of people gathered inside.

His eyes immediately landed on Mia.

He recognized her from work.

Mia was seated at a table near the center of the room, and beside her sat another woman.

The woman had patterned-colored hair and was undeniably attractive. Beautiful, sexy, and extremely busty, she drew attention without even trying. The white dress she wore hugged her figure comfortably, and the deep cleavage exposed by it made it impossible not to notice her generous chest.

Denzel found his gaze lingering on her for a moment longer than he intended.

Then his eyes flickered away.

Only to land on someone else.

His expression immediately stiffened.

’What the hell is this?’

On the opposite side of the room sat a large, plump woman.

She wasn’t particularly shapely. She was simply big, with round cheeks, a soft face, and a heavy build that gave her a somewhat formless appearance.

At that moment, she was staring directly at the newcomers who had just stepped through the door.

Antonia immediately spread her arms.

"Well, who’s ready?"

The room instantly came alive.

"Antonia!"

Mia called out excitedly.

The busty woman beside her lit up as well, greeting Antonia with obvious enthusiasm.

Then the plump woman spoke.

The moment Denzel heard her voice, he physically cringed.

’Ah, her voice sounds fucking ridiculous.’

He wasn’t even sure how to describe it.

’It’s like... I don’t know. Like some kind of cartoon character.’

He frowned.

’Or maybe one of those ridiculous trailers that’s about to crash into somebody....what do they call it again? Truck-kun? Nah, it’d sound better than her.’

The more he thought about it, the worse it became.

’Why the fuck does it sound so weird?’

For some reason, the thought almost made him laugh.

Before anyone else could speak, the woman suddenly jumped to her feet.

Then she rushed straight toward Antonia.

Without the slightest hesitation, she threw herself around her and pulled her into a tight hug.

Denzel watched the scene unfold with complete disbelief.

’I can already tell I’m going to hate this.’

His eyes narrowed.

’Who the fuck invites a shapeless fat-ass woman like this to a game night?’

Meanwhile, Antonia simply laughed.

"It’s okay, Tara..."

She chuckled warmly as she gently patted the woman’s back.

After a few moments, Tara finally pulled away.

When she spoke again, Denzel couldn’t shake the impression that she sounded as though she had water in her mouth.

Everything about her voice felt oddly exaggerated and goofy.

"Okay, okay."

She giggled awkwardly.

A faint blush appeared across her cheeks.

"Sorry, Antonia. I just got really excited."

She let out a small grunt before finally noticing Denzel standing nearby.

Her eyes widened slightly.

Almost immediately, another blush spread across her face.

"Huh?"

She tilted her head as she looked him up and down.

"Who is this handsome fellow?"

Denzel felt immediate disgust.

’Getting called handsome by a woman this hideous is repulsive. I can barely keep my eyes on her.’

He quickly looked away, trying to preserve as much of his eye sight as he could.

Antonia narrowed her eyes, studying him.

"Mm. Is he shy?"

Denzel wasn’t shy. Far from it.

He was completely repulsed.

The expression on his face had nothing to do with nervousness.

Mia, on seeing this, laughed a bit.

"He’s a friend from work."

She pointed toward him.

"And if I remember correctly, he’s Denzel, right?"

Denzel’s gaze immediately drifted toward the busty woman, Mia, sitting at the table.

A small smile tugged at the corner of his mouth.

’Finally. Somebody pretty.’

"Yeah," he said.

"I’m Denzel."

Before he could say anything else, the plump woman suddenly stepped directly in front of him.

To Denzel, it felt like a hideous Halloween decoration had abruptly sprung to life and appeared in his path.

She beamed at him.

"I’m Tara."

The sound of her voice hit him again.

Just as awful as before.

Denzel nearly recoiled.

"Uh... I’m aware of that."

Tara giggled.

Then she enthusiastically stretched out her hand.

"Pleased to meet you..."

Denzel glanced away almost immediately.

"Sure."

Reluctantly, he reached out and shook her hand before quickly pulling his own back.

At that moment, another voice called out from his side.

"Yeah, I’ve been with her all night getting the drinks ready, Antonia."

Denzel turned.

The voice belonged to the busty woman.

His eyes settled on her instantly.

’I’ve never met her before.’

He studied her carefully.

’She’s definitely not from work..

So who the hell is she?’

Antonia smiled warmly at the woman.

"I’m sorry, baby. You know how it is."

The woman laughed softly as she responded.

"You know I can’t help it. I barely get to see you these days."

As she spoke, Antonia walked toward the woman, Then something happened that completely caught Denzel off guard.

The Antonia leaned forward and kissed the woman.

Not a quick peck...A genuine kiss.

Their lips met and lingered together for several moments before they finally pulled apart.

Denzel stared.

The woman looked visibly pleased afterward, while Antonia appeared equally happy.

For a moment, Denzel could only blink.

’It’s not like this is the first time I’ve seen two girls kiss.’

His gaze remained fixed on them.

’...I mean I watched alot of porn back in the day, so I knew it was hit....’

He swallowed.

’But damn...I didn’t think it would be this hot.’

The sight left him far more distracted than he wanted to admit.

Meanwhile, the woman smiled and gently brushed the back of her hand along Antonia’s forearm.

"I know, I know."

Her voice carried a playful affection.

"But sometimes you need to keep a little of yourself for me instead of spending all your time running around."

A faint blush appeared on Antonia’s cheeks.

"I know, baby. I’m sorry."

She laughed awkwardly.

"I’ll do my absolute best."

A few seconds later, Antonia suddenly froze. Then she let out a small gasp.

"Oh."

She turned toward Denzel.

"I’m sorry, Denzel. I completely forgot to introduce you."

She gestured toward the woman beside her.

"Denzel, meet Sarah."

A warm smile spread across her face.

"My girlfriend."

Denzel’s eyes widened.

’Girlfriend?’

His thoughts immediately began racing.

’This bitch isn’t just a lesbian.’

His gaze flickered between the two women.

’She’s already taken.’

Oddly enough, the realization only excited him even more.

His body trembled slightly as he stared at them, his mind was already spiraling down dangerous paths.

’I want them...both of them..’

His eyes remained fixed on the pair.

The thought rooted itself stubbornly in his head.

’I’m going to do it...I’m going to fuck this two lesbo bitches!’

This was the beginning of the events which would lead to a full change in Denzel’s life.
